prevalence.trend: stable; improved detection with specialist services

vulnerablePopulations: patients with delayed referral to sleep clinics
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: PSG + MSLT confirmation with SOREMP criteria; CSF hypocretin testing in specialized centers; European sleep medicine pathways

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to sleep clinics and medications; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Broad access to PSG/MSLT in specialist centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Wake-promoting agents and anticataplectic therapy; structured follow-up in sleep clinics
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access variability across member states and medication reimbursement differences
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong specialist sleep medicine infrastructure in many countries
